Poseidon2b_n64t8:

n = 64
t = 8
rF = 8
rP = 29
r = 37
alpha = 7

  name: GF(2^64)
  characteristic: 2
  degree: 64
  order: 18446744073709551616
  irreducible_poly: x^64 + x^33 + x^30 + x^26 + x^25 + x^24 + x^23 + x^22 + x^21 + x^20 + x^18 + x^13 + x^12 + x^11 + x^10 + x^7 + x^5 + x^4 + x^2 + x + 1

  primitive_element: x
